description_long: This motorcycle features a futuristic, aerodynamic design with sharp, angular bodywork and a streamlined profile. The main body is predominantly gray with black and metallic accents, and it includes a sculpted fuel tank, aggressive front fairing, and integrated side panels. The wheels are highlighted with subtle blue accents along the rims, and the front suspension is gold, suggesting high-performance components. The seat is contoured for a single rider, with a raised rear section and a pointed tail. The handlebars are low and sporty, and the exhaust system is compact and tucked under the rear. The overall appearance is that of a high-end, modern sportbike suitable for urban environments.
description: A sleek, futuristic sport motorcycle with angular gray and black bodywork, blue rim accents, and gold front suspension. It has a streamlined, aggressive design and a single contoured seat.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sharp, angular fairing, narrow headlight area, and gold front suspension.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sculpted fuel tank, blue-accented wheels, and compact exhaust system.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the pointed tail, dual rear lights, and wide rear tire.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the aerodynamic body panels, low handlebars, and detailed engine area.
